description: The Aryan Brotherhood of Texas is a white supremacist prison gang operating in Texas state prisons. Founded in the early 1980s by Texas inmates after being denied affiliation with the original Aryan Brotherhood, it emerged as one of the largest and most violent prison gangs in the United States. The group is responsible for numerous murders, drug trafficking, extortion, and other violent crimes. It remains active with an estimated 3,500 members.

country_links.evidence_quote: concentrada principalmente en Texas, pero también en las prisiones de los estados vecinos, en particular Nuevo México
country_links.context: The Aryan Brotherhood of Texas has members in prisons of neighboring states, specifically New Mexico.

country_links.evidence_quote: la Hermandad Aria de Texas es una de las pandillas de prisión más grandes y violentas, así como una de las organizaciones criminales más organizadas en los Estados Unidos
country_links.context: The Aryan Brotherhood of Texas operates in prisons and outside, committing murders and other violent crimes across the United States.
